scripts.test: node --import tsx/esm node_modules/@cucumber/cucumber/bin/cucumber-js -i step-definitions/world.ts -i step-definitions/guard.steps.ts -i step-definitions/signature.steps.ts -i step-definitions/rebac.steps.ts
scripts.test:dry: node --import tsx/esm node_modules/@cucumber/cucumber/bin/cucumber-js --dry-run -i step-definitions/world.ts -i step-definitions/guard.steps.ts -i step-definitions/signature.steps.ts -i step-definitions/rebac.steps.ts
scripts.test:tags: node --import tsx/esm node_modules/@cucumber/cucumber/bin/cucumber-js -i step-definitions/world.ts -i step-definitions/guard.steps.ts -i step-definitions/signature.steps.ts -i step-definitions/rebac.steps.ts --tags
